response.original_title: Infinito infinito, na Imaginação da Matéria
response.overview: Infinity infinity, on the imagination of matter approaches a group of children who gather to play in an urban vegetal environment in the Massarelos valley, in Porto, while also accompanying certain practices and reflections within the student context of the local Fine Arts Academy, in order to rethink exploratory group movements, art education, childhood in continuity with creative potential, experimentalism, and the sense of home, institution, and city.
response.title: Infinity infinity, on the imagination of matter
